notes: This file defines a pullback-only `PullbackIsogeny` structure (no point map) that is largely superseded by the fuller `Isogeny` in Basic.lean, which duplicates all five derived declarations nearly verbatim. The three lemmas `pullback_injective`, `comp_algebraMap_eq`, and `comp_degree` are unreferenced within the file and serve only as an API surface for `SeparableDegree.lean` consumers.
